versions.content: A hazard icon indicates that the villain is more dangerous. During step 3 of the villain phase, deal one additional encounter card for each hazard icon in play. These additional cards are dealt in player order.

Hero is one of the two forms an identity card can take. While in hero form, a player can trigger hero actions, use basic attack and thwart powers, and is targeted by villain attacks during the villain phase.
Hit points represent the vitality of characters. A character's hit points are reduced by damage and increased by healing. If a character's hit points are reduced to 0, that character is defeated.
